pi_items.source: Task description ('A bloated SQLite database has been identified at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_bloated.db') and setup_task.sh script (lines 10-12) both specify this identical path
Task description ('Export all audit logs...to a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/exports/audit_archive.csv') and setup_task.sh script (line 11) both specify this identical path

Task description states 'Export all audit logs strictly BEFORE 2024-01-01' and setup_task.sh/export_result.sh both use this exact date as cutoff. Verified through code analysis of cutoff logic and Python data generation script

Independent simulation of database generation using exact script logic with seed 42: Initial size ~53.4 MB, after deletion of 26,831 old records (66.5% of data) and VACUUM operation, actual final size measures 17.6 MB (33% of initial). Metadata claims 25.0 MB target which is higher than actual achieved size

Simulation of database generation with setup_task.sh script logic: 40,000 records × ~1.3KB per record = 53.4 MB physical file size (with indexes). Task description states '~50MB' which is approximate and within reasonable margin

Exact simulation of random.seed(42) with script's random.choices() and random.randint() calls in setup_task.sh lines 59-61. The weights=[1,1,1] produce approximately equal probability per year, but randomness creates the observed 2:1 old:new distribution

privileged_info_summary: The chinook_bloated.db database is synthetically generated by the setup_task.sh script using deterministic seed 42, containing 40,000 audit log records (26,831 pre-2024, 13,169 post-2024). Initial database size is approximately 53.4 MB. After archiving old records and running VACUUM optimization, the actual final database size achieves 17.6 MB (33% of original). The metadata target_size_mb of 25.0 MB is higher than the achieved 17.6 MB. All file paths (db_path: /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_bloated.db, archive_path: /home/ga/Documents/exports/audit_archive.csv) and the cutoff_date of 2024-01-01 are verified against task description and setup scripts.
